name: FutureFuel Corp.
summary: FutureFuel Corp. is a Delaware corporation that manufactures inorganic chemicals, bio-based specialty chemicals, and biofuels through its subsidiary FutureFuel Chemical Company at an integrated 2,200-acre facility in Batesville, Arkansas. Its two segments are Chemicals (custom manufacturing of biocides, specialty polymers, dyes, and performance chemicals including polymer modifiers and specialty solvents) and Biofuels (biodiesel production with ~59 MMgy capacity). The company is NYSE-listed under ticker FF.

products.name: Custom Manufactured Specialty Chemicals
products.description: Proprietary molecules produced for specific customers under long-term contracts, including biocides, specialty polymers, and dyes.

products.name: Biodiesel (Fatty Acid Mono-Alkyl Esters)
products.description: Biodiesel and petrodiesel blends produced at a facility with ~59 million gallon per year capacity.

products.name: Polymer Modifiers
products.description: Specialty chemicals that enhance nylon and polyester for stain resistance and durability.

products.name: Specialty Solvents & Surfactants
products.description: Used in industrial and consumer cleaning applications.

products.name: Glycerin Products
products.description: High-purity byproducts refined from biodiesel production for diverse specialty applications.

products.name: Pharmaceutical Intermediates
products.description: Building block and intermediate chemicals for pharmaceutical manufacture under ISO and GMP-certified conditions.

partnerships.description: Participation in the Responsible Care safety program.

partnerships.partner_name: Society of Chemical Manufacturers and Affiliates
partnerships.description: Participation in the Chem Stewards safety initiative.
